default.name: leftPad

parameters.description: The value to pad. Numbers are coerced to strings.
parameters.name: str

parameters.description: The desired total length of the resulting padded string.
parameters.name: len

parameters.description: The character to use for padding. Defaults to a single space character. Numbers are coerced to strings.
parameters.name: ch

returns.description: The input string left-padded with the specified character to at least the specified length.

default.signature: leftPad(str: string | number, len: number, ch?: string | number) => string
